title.en: Autumn Colour — Chlorophyll Withdraws, Anthocyanins Bloom

subtitle.en: in autumn the leaf reabsorbs chlorophyll to recover N; carotenoids that were there all summer suddenly become visible; and new anthocyanins are actively synthesised to colour the leaf red
subtitle.ko: 가을에 엽록소는 회수, 여름 내내 있던 카로테노이드가 드러나고, 안토시아닌은 새로 합성

description.en: Day slider drives three pigment concentrations: chl decays, carotenoid steady, anthocyanin rises sigmoidally. Leaf swatch shows the blended colour transition green→yellow→red.
description.ko: Day 슬라이더로 세 색소 농도: chl 감쇠, 카로 유지, antho sigmoid 증가. 잎 swatch가 녹→황→적 전환.
